summary:
# 今日社区动态（MiniMax-M2.7 | 2026-05-26 ~ 2026-05-27）

- 🧠 [Memory](#subsystem-Memory)：页面降级非临时存储指令优化减少缓存污染，大型匿名folio解映射减少TLB shootdown次数提升可扩展性，zswap支持按cgroup主动写回改善内存回收效率，同时修复了huge_memory计数器和page_alloc延迟compaction统计问题
- 🧭 [Scheduling](#subsystem-Scheduling)：本期主要为小修正和清理工作，整体风险较低
- 🌐 [Networking](#subsystem-Networking)：多核系统锁竞争优化（tc filter改用mutex）、RTL8127新增RSS支持提升数据包多核分发性能、新增Airoha/ADIN等PHY驱动完善硬件支持、Intel Ice实现完整DPLL/PTP时钟同步能力，同时修复了多个竞态条件和use-after-free安全问题
- 🛡 [Security](#subsystem-Security)：yama LSM自动清理遗留ptrace关系消除安全隐患、task_setscheduler扩展参数支持细粒度调度审计、修复key payload引用计数和TOMOYO空指针解引用防止内存损坏
- 📈 [Observability](#subsystem-Observability)：Marvell CN20K DDR PMU性能监控支持完善ARM可观测性、cs-etm前端队列机制改进提升追踪精度、libbpf STRUCT_OPS轻量骨架迭代增强BPF结构化操作能力、selftests增强resctrl/net可测试性
- 🗂 [Filesystem & Storage](#subsystem-Filesystem%20%26%20Storage)：libsas链路速率发现优化提升大规模SAS拓扑枚举效率、btrfs extent buffer页面可移动性解决迁移死锁、f2fs孤儿inode计数验证防止损坏传播、resctrl/xfs/nfsd/fuse等多项关键修复提升稳定性
- 🏗 [Architecture](#subsystem-Architecture)：Intel uncore PMU驱动清理提升性能监控稳定性、VM86移除简化代码、huge pfnmap大页映射支持优化内存管理效率、userfaultfd工作集跟踪增强虚拟化内存管理、多平台设备树和驱动支持持续扩展
- 🔋 [Power Management](#subsystem-Power%20Management)：Exynos TMU默认配置简化驱动编译、PMIC5 Gen3 ADC热传感器驱动完善高通平台热监控、tsens suspend期间唤醒中断处理改进避免漏检临界温度事件
- ⏱ [Clocks & Timers](#subsystem-Clocks%20%26%20Timers)：多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- ⚙ [Core Kernel](#subsystem-Core%20Kernel)：workqueueWQ flags使用警告机制防止配置错误、KASAN_STACK配置下zstd平衡调试信息与二进制大小、RCU defer_qs_pending状态卡死修复提升系统可靠性、KUnit测试框架持续完善
- 🧩 [Virtualization](#subsystem-Virtualization)：KVM VMX安全MSR访问器处理LBR操作防止宿主崩溃、Hyper-V mshv条件依赖增强配置灵活性、vhost/net ioctl地址计算修复防止越界访问提升内存安全
- 🧰 [Drivers](#subsystem-Drivers)：drm/msm PERFCNTR_CONFIG性能计数器、Qualcomm GENI tracepoints、rust drm gem shmem scatter-gather接口、ALSA/HID新增多设备支持、mt7621 gpio中断修复、scd30状态同步修复、多个安全漏洞修复，整体驱动生态持续完善

## Memory
- `perf` `feature` 通过引入非临时存储指令优化页面降级到低层存储的性能，直接内存写入减少缓存污染提升效率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/834)
- `perf` `feature` 大型匿名folio解映射优化，减少TLB shootdown次数并改进锁竞争，提高大内存应用的可扩展性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/263)
- `feature` slub内存分配器使用空sheaf辅助函数处理超大sheaf，简化代码逻辑并提升内存管理效率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1466)
- `feature` migrate模块修复find_mm_struct在安全检查时的竞态条件，防止use-after-free风险提升内存迁移安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1274)
- `feature` MGLRU改用folio_mark_accessed替代folio_set_referenced，保持API一致性并改进匿名页回收策略 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1045)
- `feature` compaction在检查重试适性时考虑cpuset约束，避免在不应进行 compaction的CPU集合上浪费资源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/926)
- `feature` zswap实现按cgroup的主动写回功能，允许根据内存压力阈值将冷数据提前写出，改善内存回收效率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/862)
- `feature` huge_memory修正文件PUD计数器更新时机，在folio_put前更新防止统计错误和潜在泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/690)
- `bugfix` huge_memory修正文件PMD计数器更新顺序，修复 folio_put 前的竞态条件导致统计不准确的问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/677)
- `bugfix` page_alloc修复延迟 compaction 计数器的计算错误，避免内存碎片化统计偏差影响回收决策 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/533)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/819)

## Scheduling
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1584) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1146) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/667) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/320)

## Networking
- `perf` `feature` tcf_idr_check_alloc_and_get: Use mutex instead of idr tree for action reference counting in tc filter, reducing lock contention on multi-core systems. Thomas Gleixner [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2047)
- `perf` `feature` can: bcm: defer rx_op deallocation to workqueue to avoid race condition when CAN frames arrive while socket is being closed, preventing use-after-free. Lee Jones [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1652)
- `perf` `feature` Airoha AN8801R series Gigabit Ethernet PHY driver: Add new PHY driver supporting AN8801R with Energy Efficient Ethernet and WOL features, enabling new hardware support. Louis-Alexis Eyraud [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1422)
- `perf` `feature` dpll/ice: Add generic DPLL type and full hardware support for PTP clock synchronization on Intel Ice hardware, improving timing accuracy. Grzegorz Nitka [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/583)
- `perf` `feature` r8169: add RSS support for RTL8127 to improve multi-core packet processing performance by distributing interrupts across CPU cores. javen [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/408)
- `perf` `feature` timekeeping/ptp: Expand snapshot functionality to support more precise hardware timestamps across network drivers (ice, igc, mlx5, iwlwifi), enabling better PTP synchronization. Thomas Gleixner [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1671)
- `feature` net: Add ADIN1140 support for Industrial Ethernet with Open Alliance TC6 SPI to Ethernet MAC interface, bringing driver support for Analog Devices PHY. Ciprian Regus via B4 Relay [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/27/31)
- `feature` net: ibm: emac: Reserve VLAN header in MJS limit: Account for VLAN tag in Maximum Jabber Size calculation to prevent oversized packets on IBM EMAC hardware. Rosen Penev [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1932)
- `feature` bonding: refuse to enslave CAN devices: Prevent CAN devices from being added to bonding interfaces, avoiding invalid configurations. Oliver Hartkopp [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1891)
- `feature` eth: fbnic: move aui and fec from fbnic_net to fbnic_dev: Refactor Meta Facebook NIC driver to centralize AUO and FEC resources on device struct, improving maintainability. Bobby Eshleman [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1724)
- `feature` net/mlx5: Reorder completion before putting command entry back to freelist to ensure proper synchronization in command completion handling. Nikolay Kuratov [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1562)
- `feature` netdevsim: fib: fix use-after-free of FIB data via debugfs: Fix memory safety issue when reading fib table debugfs entries. Zijing Yin [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1554)
- `feature` net: lan743x: add RMII support for PCI11x1x: Enable Reduced Media Independent Interface mode for Microchip LAN743x Ethernet controller. Thangaraj Samynathan [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1534)
- `feature` Bluetooth: hci_core: Refactor HCI reset functions to improve code structure and prepare for new reset mechanisms. Heitor Alves de Siqueira [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1148)
- `feature` net: dsa: netc: fix enetc dependencies: Correct Kconfig dependency for Network Device Tree DSA driver on NXP ENETC hardware. Arnd Bergmann [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/708)
- `feature` net/ipv6: icmp: fix is_ineligible() to block errors for Routable packets: Fix ICMP error handling for routable IPv6 packets to prevent invalid error generation. Sayooj K Karun [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/673)
- `feature` net: dsa: microchip: remove unnecessary dsa_switch_dev_register call: Clean up DSA switch registration flow by removing redundant registration step. Bastien Curutchet (Schneider Electric) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/616)
- `feature` net: fec: fix pinctrl default state restore order on resume: Correct pinctrl handling sequence during FEC resume to avoid pin configuration issues. Tapio Reijonen [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/396)
- `feature` ixgbe: implement get_queue_stats_rx: Add RX queue statistics retrieval for Intel 10GbE driver, enabling better network monitoring. Kshitiz Bartariya [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/370)
- `feature` wifi: mt76: mt7925: add wcid publish check in mt76_sta_add: Add validation for wireless client descriptor publication in MediaTek WiFi driver. Jiajia Liu [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/247)
- `feature` netfilter: flowtable: fix offloaded ct timeout never be cleaned: Resolve connection tracking timeout issue for offloaded flows in netfilter. Adrian Bente [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/240)
- `feature` net: sfp: add quirk for OEM 2.5G optical modules: Add device quirk for unsupported 2.5G SFP optical transceivers to enable proper detection. Wei Qisen [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/218)
- `feature` net: skbuff: fix missing zerocopy reference in pskb_may_pull: Fix socket buffer coalescing to properly handle zero-copy references during packet processing. lazyming [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/174)
- `feature` Bluetooth: L2CAP: fix heap over-read in l2cap_get_cached_info_by_cid: Prevent buffer overread when accessing L2CAP channel information for Bluetooth. Muhammad Bilal [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/91)
- `feature` ice: dpll: fix memory leak in ice_dpll_init_info error path: Fix memory leak when DPLL initialization fails on Intel Ice NIC. ZhaoJinming [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/89)
- `feature` wifi: mt76: track rx napi ownership for cleanup: Improve NAPI ownership tracking in MediaTek wireless driver for proper resource cleanup. Ruslan Isaev [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/28)
- `feature` Bluetooth: btusb: Add USB ID 2c4e:0128 for Mercusys MA60XNB: Add support for new Bluetooth USB adapter. Zenm Chen [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/3)
- `bugfix` net/sched: act_api: use mutex in tcf_idr_check_alloc_and_get: Fix race condition in traffic control action API by using mutex instead of IDR for reference counting. Kyle Zeng [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2047)
- `bugfix` More NFSD fixes for 7.1-rc: Multiple NFS daemon fixes including lockd and cache handling improvements. Chuck Lever [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1902)
- `bugfix` SUNRPC: always drain cache_cleaner before destroying a cache_queue: Ensure proper cleanup sequence of RPC cache queues to prevent leaks. Jeff Layton [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1893)
- `bugfix` net/sched: fix pedit partial COW leading to page fault: Fix copy-on-write issue in packet editing action causing page faults under certain conditions. Jamal Hadi Salim [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1492)
- `bugfix` NFC for v7.1-rc5: NFC subsystem fixes for HCI, LLCP, and NXP NCI drivers. David Heidelberg [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/933)
- `bugfix` vsock/vmci: fix sk_ack_backlog leak on failed handshake: Fix socket backlog leak when vSocket VMCI transport handshake fails. Raf Dickson [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/730)
- `bugfix` net: stmmac: fix fatal bus error on resume by reinitializing hardware: Fix fatal bus errors when resuming STMicroelectronics Ethernet MAC from low power state. Ding Hui [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/111)
- `bugfix` llc: Fix NULL pointer dereference in llc_conn_state_process: Prevent NULL dereference in LLC connection state machine processing. Jiakai Xu [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/61)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/4)

## Security
- `feature` 添加 yama LSM 激活时自动清理已有的 ptrace 关系，避免遗留的跟踪关系导致安全隐患，同时简化状态管理流程 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1450)
- `feature` 扩展 task_setscheduler LSM hook 的参数，使安全模块能够获取更完整的调度上下文信息，便于实现细粒度的调度权限控制和审计能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1246)
- `bugfix` 在 request_key_auth 实例化路径中固定 payload 引用计数，防止 key 被提前释放导致内存损坏，提升密钥系统的稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/123)
- `bugfix` 修复 TOMOYO 初始化请求解析时的空指针解引用，防止特定策略配置下触发内核崩溃，增强安全模块健壮性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/56)
- `bugfix` 修复 AppArmor 策略数据去重循环中的 use-after-free 漏洞，消除潜在的内存安全风险和潜在的权限提升可能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/14)

## Observability
- `perf` `feature` selftests/vfio 新增 Intel IGB 驱动支持，完善 VFIO PCI 设备测试框架以提升驱动验证能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2113)
- `perf` `feature` 工具 clang-format 规则优化，优先处理 Python.h 头文件并扩展其他格式配置，提升代码风格检查效率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2023)
- `perf` `feature` 增加 Marvell CN20K DDR PMU 性能监控单元支持，完善 ARM 架构内存控制器可观测性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1595)
- `perf` `feature` cs-etm 优化 CoreSight 跟踪包处理，前端队列机制改进提升上下文切换追踪精度 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/794)
- `perf` `feature` libbpf 为 LoongArch 架构添加 __NR_bpf 系统调用号定义，完善 BPF 工具链架构兼容性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/277)
- `feature` x86/fpu 增强信号帧可移植性，修复跨架构浮点状态恢复问题，提升异常处理稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1953)
- `feature` seccomp 允许 SECCOMP_MODE_STRICT 与特定系统调用组合使用，增强安全模式灵活性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1467)
- `feature` libbpf 支持 STRUCT_OPS 轻量骨架生成，改善 BPF 程序结构化操作能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1188)
- `feature` libbpf 支持 STRUCT_OPS 轻量骨架（v2 迭代），持续完善 BPF 结构化操作接口 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/902)
- `feature` bpf/cgroup 修复 sysctl 新值处理逻辑，确保 cgroup 层级控制安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1048)
- `feature` bpf/cgroup 修复 sysctl 新值处理逻辑（重复提交），验证修复方案 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1066)
- `feature` rtla/actions 恢复 actions_perform() 中的 continue 标志，修复实时跟踪动作执行流程 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/704)
- `feature` selftests/resctrl 为 aarch64 实现 cl_flush() 和 sb() 指令，增强缓存层级测试能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/122)
- `feature` selftests/resctrl 添加 L3_CAT 测试跳过逻辑，处理无独占缓存场景 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/118)
- `feature` selftests/resctrl 增加 ARM 厂商检测并修复非一致性测试问题，完善异构架构支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/117)
- `feature` selftests/net 为 PPPoL2TP 添加 socat 系统日志支持，增强网络协议可观测性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/65)
- `bugfix` sched_ext 修复 scx_show_state 每调度器状态读取错误，恢复正确状态展示功能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1133)
- `bugfix` selftest 修复 getline 未初始化导致的未定义行为，提升测试代码健壮性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/844)
- `bugfix` tracing 修复 field_var_str 内存分配错误号问题，防止分配失败时资源泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/638)
- `bugfix` selftests 修复 Makefile nsfs 目标问题，确保命名空间测试正确构建 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/397)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/632)

## Filesystem & Storage
- `perf` `feature` libsas 改进 SAS 链路速率发现机制，通过优化 sas_addr 查找和设备匹配逻辑提升设备枚举效率，对大规模 SAS 拓扑环境的发现性能有显著改善 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/76)
- `feature` btrfs 将嵌入在 extent buffer 中的 btree 页面分配为可移动类型，解决页面迁移时的潜在死锁问题并提升内存碎片整理效率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2065)
- `feature` nfsd 改进会话槽释放逻辑，避免释放在使用中的会话槽，防止并发访问时的状态不一致和潜在崩溃 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1552)
- `feature` ext4 移除对 PageWriteback 的提及和使用，清理过时的实现细节，使页面 I/O 子系统更简洁 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1856)
- `feature` blk-zoned 修复区域块设备写错误路径中的 zwplug 引用计数泄漏，确保错误处理时资源正确释放 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1210)
- `feature` ntfs3 对 attrib、file、inode 等核心模块进行错误修复和代码重构，提升稳定性与可维护性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1130)
- `feature` ufs core 在 SCSI 错误处理后完成工作负载运行时恢复，确保恢复流程完整性避免功能异常 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/876)
- `feature` block partitions 修复 of_partition 中 of_node 引用计数泄漏，使用正确的引用管理避免内存泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/686)
- `feature` f2fs 添加孤儿 inode 条目计数验证，在 checkpoint 时检测数据完整性问题防止文件系统损坏传播 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/205)
- `bugfix` resctrl 修复 x86 资源控制子系统的多个长期问题，涉及核心调度、AET 错误处理、控制监控和组管理的综合修复 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2068)
- `bugfix` nfsd 修复回调通道相关问题，确保 NFSv4.1+ 会话回调的正确建立和维护 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1563)
- `bugfix` fuse 使用页面作为未缓存 readdir 缓冲区的后备存储，解决缓冲区管理问题提升目录读取稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1435)
- `bugfix` scsi pm8001 修复驱动结构体布局问题并适配 FORTIFY_SOURCE 安全检查，提升驱动安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1242)

- `bugfix` xfs 修复 CoW fork 修复错误处理逻辑，避免文件系统一致性检查时的错误路径问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/938)
- `bugfix` f2fs 修复 f2fs_write_end_io() 中的 cp_wait 使用后释放问题，防止内核崩溃 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/153)

## Power Management
- `perf` `feature` cpufreq/amd-pstate：删除过时的 @epp_cached kdoc 注释，清理代码中的冗余文档，提升代码可维护性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/97)
- `feature` thermal: samsung：为 Exynos 平台热监控单元（TMU）启用默认配置，简化驱动编译复杂度，使 TMU 在多数 Exynos 设备上开箱即用 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1159)
- `feature` thermal: qcom：为 PMIC5 Gen3 添加 ADC 热传感器驱动支持，实现新一代高通电源管理芯片的热监控能力，配合 qcom-spmi-adc5-gen3 驱动实现精准温度采样 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/761)
- `feature` regulator: mt6363：修复 MT6363 稳压器对 CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN 的依赖缺失问题，防止编译错误，确保中断控制器支持正确配置 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/679)
- `feature` thermal: qcom: tsens：改进 tsens 温感驱动在系统挂起时的唤醒中断处理逻辑，增强uspend 期间热监控的可靠性，避免漏检临界温度事件 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/676)

## Core Kernel
- `feature` workqueue新增WQ flags使用警告和检查机制，帮助开发者发现不正确的workqueue配置标志使用，防止潜在的死锁和性能问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1431)
- `feature` KASAN_STACK配置下zstd减少函数内联，平衡调试信息获取与二进制大小，避免KASAN插桩导致的过大大镜像文件 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1268)
- `feature` kcov使用WRITE_ONCE保护selftest模式存储，消除数据竞争风险，确保覆盖率收集中对模式标志的安全访问 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/859)
- `feature` KUnit测试框架修复更新，完善executor和test相关代码，修补测试执行流程中的缺陷，提升内核单元测试基础设施的稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1899)
- `feature` string_kunit新增strnlen()测试用例，覆盖无null终止符字符串的边界情况，增强字符串操作函数的测试覆盖率 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/527)
- `bugfix` RCU修复defer_qs_pending状态卡死问题，涉及tree.c等RCU核心文件中的状态转换逻辑，确保RCU在延迟等待时不会陷入僵死状态，提升系统可靠性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2078)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1777) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/981)

## Virtualization
- `feature` KVM: VMX 引入安全的 MSR 访问器来处理 LBR（最后分支记录）操作，避免在 Guest 退出时因 MSR 访问错误导致宿主系统崩溃，提升了 Intel 处理器上 KVM 虚拟机的稳定性和可靠性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/27/3)
- `feature` Hyper-V mshv 驱动添加条件依赖，允许 mshv 模块在 VMBus 支持被禁用时仍能构建，增强了 Hyper-V 虚拟化子系统的配置灵活性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1189)
- `bugfix` vhost/net 修复了 VHOST_GET_FEATURES ioctl 中 clear_user 操作的地址计算问题，防止在向用户空间复制数据时出现越界访问，提升了 vhost-net 虚拟化网络前端的内存安全 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/395)

- `perf` `feature` 高通 GENI Serial 驱动添加 tracepoints 支持，便于调试和性能分析，提升开发者对该驱动的可观测性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1697)
- `perf` `feature` drm/msm 显卡驱动新增 PERFCNTR_CONFIG ioctl，允许用户空间配置性能计数器，用于性能监控和调试 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1300)

- `feature` ASoC es9356 编解码器解决在未启用 SND_SOC_SDCA 时构建失败问题，通过条件编译适配不同配置 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2037)
- `feature` drm/xe Xe 显卡驱动在 pagefault 报告中添加 SRCID 字段，便于追踪和调试 GPU 页错误来源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/27/27)
- `feature` rust drm gem shmem 模块添加 sg_table() 函数，为 Rust DRM 层提供共享内存 scatter-gather 表访问接口 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/2015)
- `feature` drm/hyperv Hyper-V 虚拟显示驱动将符号前缀从 hyperv_ 改为 hvdrm_，避免与微软驱动命名冲突 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1961)
- `feature` ALSA hda cs420x 为 iMac16,1 型号添加 CS4208 修复补丁，确保该苹果设备音频正常工作 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1930)
- `feature` drm blend 混合模式属性在缺少 PRIMARY 平面时也能正常工作，增强 DRM 驱动的灵活性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1784)
- `feature` ALSA usb-audio 新增 QUIRK_FLAG_MIXER_SKIP_GET_CUR_VOL 标志，允许特定声卡跳过获取当前音量，兼容更多 USB 音频设备 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/27/4)
- `feature` rust clk 驱动添加 ExclusiveClk 独占时钟类型并在 pwm-th1520 中使用，增强 Rust 硬件抽象层 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1656)
- `feature` drm atomic DRM 原子模式初始化状态分配重构，改进驱动开发模型并减少内存碎片风险 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1588)
- `feature` ALSA seq oss 修复嵌入式 SI 子系统处理时可能的释放后使用漏洞，提升安全性和稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1404)
- `feature` mtd spi-nor SPI NOR 闪存驱动大幅增强软件保护功能，支持更细粒度的写入保护控制 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1305)
- `feature` driver core platform 驱动核心在设备初始化时提前设置 MSI 中断域，解决 RISC-V 平台设备中断映射问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1387)
- `feature` i2c K1 驱动将 SpacemiT 平台设置为默认配置，简化该平台设备树匹配 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1247)
- `feature` drm vkms 虚拟 KMS 驱动回退通用 vblank timer 功能到 6.18.y 分支，确保旧版本兼容性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1102)
- `feature` gpio mt7621 修复中断 banks 映射错误，确保 MediaTek MT7621 芯片 GPIO 中断正确路由 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/1065)
- `feature` drm probe_helper 将热插拔连接器 ID 传递给用户空间，便于桌面环境精确识别显示器连接事件 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/956)
- `feature` driver core 撤销之前的 mod_delayed_work 改动，恢复原有延迟工作实现，解决潜在驱动加载时序问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/881)
- `feature` ALSA hda hdmi 使用 AC_PINSENSE_ELDV 标志改进 HDMI 音频引脚检测，提升音频插拔事件可靠性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/806)
- `feature` i2c davinci 修复缺少时钟频率时的除零崩溃，增强 DaVinci I2C 控制器驱动的健壮性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/687)
- `feature` drm scdc 添加 SCDC 信息到 connector debugfs，便于调试 HDMI 链路状态和配置 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/691)
- `feature` drm tiny PIXPAPER 4.26 英寸单色电子纸显示器驱动新增支持，丰富 DRM tiny 驱动生态 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/655)
- `feature` mtd inftlmount 将弃用的 KERN_WARNING 打印改为 pr_warn 统一日志格式，便于日志分析 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/613)
- `feature` i2c designware 为 LECARC SoC 添加 ACPI ID LECA0003 支持，扩展该 I2C 控制器的硬件兼容范围 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/458)
- `feature` drm imagination PowerVR 显卡在关闭前同步中断处理，防止关闭时的竞态条件导致系统不稳定 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/412)
- `feature` drm renesas RZ/G3L LVDS 编码器驱动新增支持，为该芯片系列提供 LVDS 显示输出能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/366)

- `feature` ALSA pcm 修复 PCM 子系统退出时 import_ubuf 可能导致的 NULL 指针解引用崩溃 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/26/59)
